case_title: MARCELO ARMONDO LACOUR VS. SUSAN LAMAGNA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/27/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION RE: AMENDED COMPLAINT TO CHANGE PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF UPDATING HIS MAILING ADDRESS TO REMOVE THE PO BOX ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAGNA, SUSAN LAMAGNA, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAGNA, SUSAN LAMAGNA, NICHOLAS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED SERVED MAY-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAGNA, SUSAN

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO NICHOLAS LAMAGNA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 AT 6:30 P.M. AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF MARCELO ARMONDO LACOUR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAGNA, NICHOLAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LACOUR, MARCELO ARMONDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMAGNA, SUSAN $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST NICHOLAS LAMAGNA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MAILING OF COURT ORDERED CONTINUANCE TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARCELO ARMONDO LACOUR & DEFENDANT SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARCELO ARMONDO LACOUR & DEFENDANT SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJDUCE THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-26-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARCELO ARMONDO LACOUR & DEFENDANT SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO SUSAN LAMAGNA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO NICHOLAS LAMAGNA. DEFENDANT SUSAN LAMAGNA WAIVES NOTICE OF THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
